\tzpentry{ID4833}{Text Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4833 introduces Text Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{\\mathcal{H}}_{\\text{SC}} = \\sum_{\\mathbf{k}, \\sigma} (\\epsilon_{\\mathbf{k}} - \\mu) \\hat{c}_{\\mathbf{k} \\sigma}^\\dagger \\hat{c}_{\\mathbf{k} \\sigma} + \\Delta \\sum_{\\mathbf{k}} \\left( \\hat{c}_{\\mathbf{k} \\uparrow}^\\dagger \\hat{c}_{-\\mathbf{k} \\downarrow}^\\dagger + \\hat{c}_{-\\mathbf{k} \\downarrow} \\hat{c}_{\\mathbf{k} \\uparrow} \\right)$$
